title: Cursed Modpack
description: The kitchen sink of the cursed mods
body: **Are you tired of the normal minecraft expirence? If yes try this hilarious kitchen sink modpack full of cursed mods to try. Do you want a Pig who eates other animals and then becomes giant? I got you,do you want to exceed the max height limit of minecraft? Well now you can build up to 4064 blocks :P,Do you want to kill everyone with one click on creative mode? I got you covered,do you want to have a Blahaj as decoreation in your minecraft world?Well apparentaly i got you covered,do you want to pick up a animal or chest?Igot you covered,and i want to be sure who you are a human so you gotta do a captcha every few minutes** ### 🔧Features: **This modpack offres a complete exprience with all the cursed mod on modrinth page Offres some optimations mods for getting the smoothes expirence ever And offres qol mods for helping you on your adventure** ### there are some rules for getting your mod on this modpack 1: your mod can't be a horror mod:We want to provide the funniest experince possible and horror mod don't provide that 2:Your mod has to be on modrinth:we want to have the most accesible mods possible so please request mods wo are only on modrinth 3:Your mod has to be light:for the high amount of mods who are on this modpack we can't put heavy mod on this modpack ** If you have read all the rules and your mod respect all of that you can submit your mod by clicking on This text** ### This modpack is archived and will not be updated do not ask for updates. Thanks for the support you have given to me -UpsidedownProduction
